## Location checklist

<!-- Delete this section for code-only pull requests. -->

- [ ] I captured both submitted screenshots myself.
- [ ] The HUD, minimap, cursor, heroes, and temporary effects are hidden.
- [ ] The location folder was generated by RooGuessr's **Add your own** location builder.
- [ ] The folder contains exactly `question.webp`, `answer.webp`, and `answer.txt`.
- [ ] Both images are 1400×1000; the question is the close-up and the answer reveals it in context.
- [ ] `answer.txt` uses normalized coordinates from the bottom-left of the full map.
- [ ] The Dota map version is recorded accurately.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally, or the pull request checks pass on GitHub.
